title: hoheria equitum
intro: Hoheria equitum, also known as the lacebark or mountain ribbonwood, is a shrub or small tree native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hoheria equitum include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Hoheria equitum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
